title: [codereview-P2] Conference test lacks radio stress
description: The test_500_node_conference in test_scale.py:337 only uses sim.add_node, set_position, remove_node. It bypasses the radio layer, medium simulation, collision detection, SCHC fragmentation, and RPL. For a true 500-node conference stress test with high collision rates, must add multiple start_transmission() calls with realistic payloads (announces, CoAP, SenML) and validate metrics (collisions, delivery rate, PER). Reference: test_medium.py and test_topology_scenarios.py:100+. random.seed(42) is good for repro.
